project_context.vibe: Dark Editorial, bold typography, minimal, 2026 high-end design (Awwwards style)
key_functionalities: Hero with massive typography and typewriter effect
About me with dark moody portrait
Projects grid with Tabs filtering, search, and 3D tilt hover effect
Contact form with sonner toast (demo mode)

rules: Headings (H1/H2) MUST use Cormorant Garamond with tight tracking (tracking-tighter) and light-to-regular font weights to emulate luxury editorial magazines.
H1 should be massive on desktop (text-6xl or clamped size up to 5vw) and scale down gracefully on mobile.
Body text MUST use Manrope for high legibility.
Use JetBrains Mono for small tech labels, metadata, command palette hints, and overlines (uppercase, tracking-widest).
DO NOT use generic purple or blue gradients. Color palette must be strictly monochromatic to let the typography and images stand out.
Use extremely subtle borders (border-white/10) to separate sections rather than heavy cards.
Never use pure black #000000 for text or white #FFFFFF for backgrounds.
DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding. gap-12 or gap-16 for grid items.
layouts.projects_grid: Bento-style or masonry-like asymmetrical grid. Mix wide items (col-span-2) with tall items (row-span-2).
layouts.hero_section: Typographic focus. Massive text taking up 70% of the screen. No standard split left/right layout unless heavily asymmetric.

motion.cursor: Implement a custom trailing cursor using framer-motion that inverted-blends with text.
motion.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion.cards: Use react-parallax-tilt for a 3D glass glare effect on project cards.
motion.page_transitions: Staggered fade-up for grid items and text lines on scroll (use framer-motion variants).

custom: Mock GitHub contribution graph (SVG or flex grid of small squares)

about_me_portrait.description: Dark moody portrait of a man coding, ideal for the About section.

blog_cover_1.description: Abstract black and white wavy shapes for article thumbnail.

blog_cover_2.description: Dark 3D geometric abstract for article thumbnail.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use JavaScript (.js/.jsx) for all components. Do NOT use TypeScript (.tsx).
Setup a single-page smooth scroll layout (using Lenis) with anchor links for sections.
Implement a Dark Theme by default. You may skip light theme to preserve the editorial vibe.
Make sure the contact form is non-functional but triggers a success Toast using Sonner.
Replace Instagram with a Discord link in the footer and socials component.
Create a mocked GitHub contribution graph using a grid of small divs with varying opacities of a single color (e.g., white or grey).
Add a Command Palette (Ctrl+K) that allows jumping to sections (About, Projects, Experience, Contact) and executing actions like 'Copy Email' or 'Download Resume'.
Ensure the Custom Cursor is un-intrusive. Disable it on mobile breakpoints.
All interactive elements and key informational elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
DO NOT center align the app container. No '.App { text-align: center; }'.
Ensure no completely transparent backgrounds on headers that overlap text.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide React for modern, crisp iconography. Discord icon is required.
Do NOT use placeholder image URLs. Use the provided image URLs.
accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios meet APCA standards. Off-white on black is excellent.
Add aria-hidden='true' to purely decorative elements like the background textures or custom cursor.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all framer-motion animations.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Ensure text must be left aligned by default for natural reading flow.
Use pre-existing Shadcn UI components in src/components/ui where possible, customizing them heavily with Tailwind.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
